production_note: agentic_L2 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# skeptic L2 S35 S35-T1-A-E1: cruce theory/iDo antes de editar
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-035-1A", **{'drops': {'shared_phone': 0.1, 'amount_7d': 0.03}, 'metric': 'precision_at_k', 'means_fraud': False}}
meets_contract = record["means_fraud"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_CAUSAL_CLAIM"
print("S35-T1-A", status)

La entrada es el dict completo del starter; la operación debe demostrar r. Prefiero la forma aburrida y explícita: `record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-035-1A", **{'drops': {'shared_phone': 0.1, 'amoun`. Releí con cuidado el paquete L2 de S35 para S35-T1-A-E3: si el starter trae DEFECTO/TODO, lo corrijo sin reescribir fixtures; hints: Una ausencia no equivale a breach: enrútala a `REQUEST_METRIC_DROP` antes de evaluar el contenido..
